name: langguard-arbiter
description: LangGuard Arbiter — in-harness agent policy enforcement for Claude Code. Screens, enforces, and evidences every MCP tool call against your LangGuard policies at the pre-action seam (PreToolUse). Deterministic ALLOW / DENY / ESCALATE — no LLM in the enforcement loop.

host.title: LangGuard host
host.description: Your LangGuard server (prod SaaS or self-hosted). https:// required unless loopback.

api_token.title: LangGuard API key (lgr_…)
api_token.description: An lgr_ API key. Stored by Claude Code (macOS Keychain / file 0600). Used as the sync/audit bearer AND the loopback daemon bearer.

enforcement_mode.title: Enforcement mode
enforcement_mode.description: cooperative (default): fails OPEN if the local daemon dies or the key is revoked, so a session is never locked out. strict: hard-enforce — those failures are DENIED (fail-closed) once past a short cold-start grace. Recommended: strict for managed/enterprise.
